title: Accolades - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
The Murthy Law Firm has been bestowed with many accolades and honors in its history. Recognition of Sheela Murthy, as a prominent immigration lawyer, a community leader, and successful entrepreneur, is intertwined with that of the Murthy Law Firm. Her vision and leadership has made our firm what it is today. Her eye for talent and her nurturing nature have built upon our early successes with a bright, energetic, and highly capable team. Provided here are a few of the highlights.
- Prestigious AV ® Preeminent™ 5.0 out of 5 rating from Martindale-Hubbell, top rating available for any law firm in the United States, acknowledging the height of professional excellence, the highest levels of skill and integrity, and many years of experience
- Listed by Inc. 500|5000 among the fastest-growing private companies in America
- Best of Business Award by the Small Business Commerce Association (SBCA), which evaluates small businesses nationwide based on customer feedback and independent research
- A winner of the prestigious Ernst & Young Entrepreneur of the Year award
- One of seven Maryland businesses (out of 150,000) to receive the 12th Annual Global Leadership Award from the World Trade Center Institute of Baltimore
- International Bar Association’s elite Who’s Who of Business Lawyers include Sheela Murthy, Aron Finkelstein, Adam Rosen, and Khorzad Mehta among corporate immigration attorneys
- Recognized for Philanthropy, as one of the fastest-growing women-owned businesses and as a top women-owned business, as a top minority-owned business, and as a the top law firm in the Greater Baltimore area, the Baltimore Business Journal ‘s annual Book of Lists , 2016-2017
- Leadership in Law recognition from both American Desi Magazine , Washington D.C., and the Daily Record , Baltimore, MD
- Excellence in eBusiness Awards for Content and Presentation for MurthyDotCom, Baltimore Business Journal
- Included among Best Lawyers in America © for multiple years, attaining Tier 1 from 2023
- Included among the Super Lawyers Corporate Law edition, Maryland Super Lawyers , and Maryland Rising Stars , multiple years
- Innovator of the Year – recognized as furthering advancement in the local community, Baltimore Business Journal
- Brava Hall of Fame, Women Business Achievement award, Smart CEO Magazine , Baltimore, MD
- Enterprising Women – recognized among the area’s leading women-owned businesses, Baltimore Business Journal
